puzzleDescription: The final String challenge! Use the .substring() method to extract a specific part of a text based on start and end indices.
objective: Given the String 'filename' as 'Photo.jpg', extract only the extension '.jpg' and print it.
hints: Counting starts at 0: P(0), h(1), o(2), t(3), o(4), .(5).
If you only provide one number, it will take everything from that index to the end.
